events.text: Goal!  Brazil 1, Colombia 0. Thiago Silva (Brazil) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Neymar with a cross   following a corner.
Thiago Silva (Brazil) is shown the yellow card.
James Rodríguez (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Brazil 2, Colombia 0. David Luiz (Brazil) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Mario Yepes (Colombia) is shown the yellow card.
Julio César (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Brazil 2, Colombia 1. James Rodríguez (Colombia) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
